name: Emerson Electric Co.
description: Emerson Electric Co. is a global technology and software company that provides innovative solutions for customers in industrial, commercial, and residential markets. Through its Automation Solutions and Commercial & Residential Solutions businesses, Emerson helps manufacturers optimize their operations, protect personnel and the environment, and enhance energy efficiency. The company is a leader in process control, industrial automation, and climate technologies, offering a comprehensive portfolio of software, hardware, and services that drive digital transformation and operational excellence across diverse industries worldwide.

investment_theses.company_type: Industrial Automation / Process Control for US Industry
